name: Energy Transfer LP
summary: Energy Transfer LP is a master limited partnership that owns and operates a diversified portfolio of midstream and transportation energy assets. The company provides natural gas transportation, storage, processing, and gathering services, as well as crude oil, NGL, and refined products transportation and terminalling. Key assets include interstate pipelines, fractionation facilities, and LNG operations across the United States.

products.name: Natural Gas Transportation
products.description: Interstate and intrastate natural gas pipeline transportation services

products.name: Natural Gas Storage
products.description: Storage of natural gas through underground and LNG storage facilities

products.name: NGL Transportation and Fractionation
products.description: Transportation and fractionation of natural gas liquids including propane, butane, and natural gasoline

products.name: Crude Oil Transportation
products.description: Transportation of crude oil via pipeline systems including Dakota Access

products.name: Refined Products Transportation
products.description: Transportation of refined petroleum products through pipeline subsidiaries including SPLP

products.name: LNG Services
products.description: Liquefied natural gas operations via Lake Charles LNG and Lake Charles LNG Export subsidiaries

products.name: Natural Gas Gathering and Processing
products.description: Gathering and processing of natural gas from production areas

partnerships.description: 50/50 joint venture owning Florida Gas Transmission Pipeline
Joint venture ET-S Permian with Energy Transfer holding 67.5% and Sunoco LP holding 32.5%
Publicly traded partnership and consolidated subsidiary of Energy Transfer (USAC)
